description_long: This object consists of four Viking-style wooden rafts, each with a single mast and striped red-and-white sail, arranged in a row on a rectangular blue platform that simulates water. The rafts feature detailed hulls with visible planking, oar ports, and small shields along the sides, evoking historical Norse longships. The sails are taut and upright, and each raft has a raised prow and stern, with some decorative elements at the bow. The platform beneath the rafts is textured to resemble water, with subtle wave patterns and color variations. The overall appearance is that of a small fleet of traditional wooden watercraft, grouped together as if ready for a journey. No modern safety equipment or markings are visible, and the rafts appear to be constructed primarily from wood with some fabric for the sails.
description: A group of four Viking-style wooden rafts with striped sails, arranged on a blue water-like platform. Each raft features detailed wooden hulls, masts, and decorative prows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the prows of the four rafts and the striped sails aligned in a row on the blue platform.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the length of the rafts, the upright masts, and the shields along the hulls.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the sterns of the rafts and the back of the striped sails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rafts' profiles, masts, and the decorative bow details.
